## Analyzers (1)

### Enrich observables with intelligence

#### [EmlParser v2.1](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/EmlParser)
Parse and visualise EML email message. Submit a .eml formatted file and extract some useful information.

- **Author:** StrangeBee
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `file`
